title: hieracium glabrescens
intro: Hieracium glabrescens, also known as smooth hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) with yellow flowers. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium glabrescens can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which may be used to harness its medicinal properties.
